Package at.jku.se.dto.response

package at.jku.se.dto.response
  • Klassen
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    ActivityLogResponse
    Response DTO for a single activity log entry (FR-08).
    ConflictResponse
    Response DTO describing a scheduling or rule conflict (FR-15).
    DeviceResponse
    Response DTO for a device including its current state (FR-07).
    EnergyDashboardResponse
    Aggregated energy consumption dashboard for a user (FR-14).
    EnergyDashboardResponse.DeviceEnergySummary
    Per-device energy summary.
    EnergyDashboardResponse.RoomEnergySummary
    Per-room aggregated energy summary.
    EnergyLogResponse
    Response DTO for a single energy log entry.
    NotificationResponse
    Response DTO for an in-app notification (FR-12).
    RoomResponse
    Response DTO for a room.
    RuleResponse
    Response DTO for an automation rule.
    SceneDeviceStateResponse
    Response DTO for a single device-state entry within a scene.
    SceneResponse
    Response DTO for a scene including all its device states.
    ScheduleResponse
    Response DTO for a schedule.
    UserResponse
    Response DTO for a user — never exposes the password hash.
    VacationModeResponse
    Response DTO for a vacation mode configuration.
